signals.npcLine: Market pulse flickers—fear grips neon streets.
signals.questPulse: Shadow traders sniff volatile flows. Stay alert.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptos pulse weak, but underground codes shift.
signals.clueEvent: Data shards reveal cautious chatter in dark nets.

signals.npcLine: Whispers of new coins, but trust runs low.
signals.questPulse: Scan for bullish ghosts among silent blockchains.
signals.worldFeed: Active tokens swell; liquidity war heats up.
signals.clueEvent: Signal spike on lesser-known cryptos—could be trap.

signals.npcLine: Odd buzz around 'PENGU' relics—something hides beneath.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt hidden codes linked to fresh symbols rising.
signals.worldFeed: Undercity nodes detect unusual chatter tagged 'PENGU'.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted message hints at surge in shadow market.

signals.npcLine: Old corps' biotech secrets leak; risk high.
signals.questPulse: Gather intel on BIO faction’s shadow experiments.
signals.worldFeed: Biotech rumors swirl, promise revolutions or collapse.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted leaks suggest breakthrough—and sabotage risk.

signals.npcLine: Mega market traders whisper: nothing’s certain here.
signals.questPulse: Track ACN operators weaving webs in market chaos.
signals.worldFeed: Trader nets flicker, tension rising under neon glow.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted nods hint at corporate power plays.
